projects.name: Finetuning Multimodal Large Language Model with Egocentric Video Data
projects.description: Finetuning multimodal large language model with egocentric video data to enhance understanding and reasoning about first-person visual information.

projects.name: Personal Egocentric Video Assitant
projects.description: Building a personal egocentric video assistant system focused on memory construction and memory retrieval for question answering.

projects.name: Finetuning Navigation World Model with New Datasets
projects.description: Finetuning navigation world model with new navigation datasets and evaluating performance on familiar, half-familiar, and unfamiliar scenes.

projects.name: Field-based Indoor Scene Optimization Methods
projects.description: Integrating features such as physical constraints and layout rationality in indoor scenes to construct a field for guiding object layout optimization.

projects.name: Semantics for Indoor Scene Layout and Dataset Augmentation
projects.description: Modeling object relationships and functional groups in indoor scenes to expand dataset quantity and diversity for training deep generative models.
